case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK USA N.A. VS. VERNON R. REDMOND et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK USA N.A. SERVED SEP-16-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT REDMOND, VERNON R.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-14-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-14-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
